content: Are you sure you want to continue?

comment.text: This is a confirmation message displayed in a modal dialog, asking the user if they wish to proceed with an action. It appears in various contexts, such as before deleting a chat or when confirming an action related to AI tools or billing.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Albanian translation uses 'dëshiron' (you want) which is second person singular, but the subject 'Jeni' is second person plural formal, creating a grammatical mismatch that affects clarity
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Jeni i sigurt që dëshironi të vazhdoni?
